code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """Convert a list of airport‑related triples into a readable sentence."""
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Find the main subject (likely the airport name)
    subject_counts = {}
    for t in triples:
        subject_counts[t.subject] = subject_counts.get(t.subject, 0) + 1
    main_subject = max(subject_counts, key=subject_counts.get)

    # Build a mapping of predicates for each subject
    subject_data = {}
    for t in triples:
        if t.subject not in subject_data:
            subject_data[t.subject] = []
        subject_data[t.subject].append(t)

    # Template mapping for all predicates
    templates = {
        "cityServed": lambda s, o: f"{s} serves {o}",
        "location": lambda s, o: f"located in {o}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": lambda s, o: f"{o} meters above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": lambda s, o: f"{o} feet above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres": lambda s, o: f"{o} metres above sea level",
        "operatingOrganisation": lambda s, o: f"operated by {o}",
        "runwayLength": lambda s, o: f"a runway length of {o} metres",
        "runwayName": lambda s, o: f"runway {o}",
        "country": lambda s, o: f"country {o}",
        "isPartOf": lambda s, o: f"part of {o}",
        "1stRunwayLengthFeet": lambda s, o: f"first runway {o} feet long",
        "1stRunwayLengthMetre": lambda s, o: f"first runway {o} metres long",
        "1stRunwayNumber": lambda s, o: f"runway number {o}",
        "runwaySurfaceType": lambda s, o: f"runway surface {o}",
        "iataLocationIdentifier": lambda s, o: f"IATA code {o}",
        "icaoLocationIdentifier": lambda s, o: f"ICAO code {o}",
        "locationIdentifier": lambda s, o: f"location code {o}",
        "nativeName": lambda s, o: f"native name {o}",
        "owner": lambda s, o: f"owned by {o}",
        "runwaySurfaceType": lambda s, o: f"runway surface {o}",
        "capital": lambda s, o: f"capital {o}",
        "language": lambda s, o: f"language {o}",
        "leader": lambda s, o: f"leader {o}",
        "officialLanguage": lambda s, o: f"official language {o}",
        "largestCity": lambda s, o: f"largest city {o}",
        "countySeat": lambda s, o: f"county seat {o}",
        "regionServed": lambda s, o: f"region served {o}",
        "hubAirport": lambda s, o: f"hub airport {o}",
        "city": lambda s, o: f"city {o}",
        "administrativeArrondissement": lambda s, o: f"arrondissement {o}",
        "mayor": lambda s, o: f"mayor {o}",
        "currency": lambda s, o: f"currency {o}",
        "demonym": lambda s, o: f"demonym {o}",
        "ceremonialCounty": lambda s, o: f"ceremonial county {o}",
        "postalCode": lambda s, o: f"postal code {o}",
        "areaCode": lambda s, o: f"area code {o}",
        "foundingYear": lambda s, o: f"founded in {o}",
        "foundedBy": lambda s, o: f"founded by {o}",
    }

    # Build sentence parts for the main subject
    main_parts = []
    other_parts = []

    if main_subject in subject_data:
        for t in subject_data[main_subject]:
            tmpl = templates.get(t.predicate)
            if tmpl:
                phrase = tmpl(t.subject, t.object)
            else:
                phrase = f"{t.predicate} {t.object}"
            main_parts.append(phrase)

    # Build nested sentences for related subjects
    for subj, items in subject_data.items():
        if subj != main_subject:
            nested_parts = []
            for t in items:
                tmpl = templates.get(t.predicate)
                if tmpl:
                    phrase = tmpl(subj, t.object)
                else:
                    phrase = f"{t.predicate} {t.object}"
                nested_parts.append(phrase)
            if nested_parts:
                other_parts.append((subj, nested_parts))

    # Construct the complex sentence
    if main_parts:
        if len(main_parts) == 1:
            sentence = f"{main_subject} {main_parts[0]}."
        else:
            sentence = f"{main_subject} {', '.join(main_parts[:-1])}, and {main_parts[-1]}."

        # Add nested information with relative clauses
        for subj, nested_parts in other_parts:
            if nested_parts:
                if len(nested_parts) == 1:
                    sentence = f"{sentence} which is {nested_parts[0]}."
                else:
                    sentence = f"{sentence}, which is {', '.join(nested_parts[:-1])}, and {nested_parts[-1]}."

        return sentence
    else:
        # Fallback for when no main subject is found
        phrases = []
        for t in triples:
            tmpl = templates.get(t.predicate)
            if tmpl:
                phrase = tmpl(t.subject, t.object)
            else:
                phrase = f"{t.subject} {t.predicate} {t.object}"
            phrases.append(phrase)
        if len(phrases) == 1:
            return phrases[0] + "."
        return ", ".join(phrases[:-1]) + ", and " + phrases[-1] + "."

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
